mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS stays near the effective lower bound while CPIAUCSL continues to trend up, real policy rates fall and inflation expectations drift higher, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield upward over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL is rising but the 10-year yield falls in most 20-day windows, or if the signal loses directional accuracy below 55% in the low-rate regime.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals labor market deterioration and weaker growth expectations, which depresses the 10-year Treasury yield within about one month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points from its prior monthly reading
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE trigger events are followed by higher 10-year yields more than half the time, or if the average 20-day yield change is not negative after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly sales growth in RSAFS indicates resilient final demand and firmer nominal growth, which lifts term premium and the 10-year Treasury yield over a 5-day-to-1-month window.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth exceeds its 3-month moving average by 1 standard deviation
failure_condition: Reject if sales-surprise trigger events do not precede higher yields on average within 5 trading days, or if the sign reverses during repeated strong-demand episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous slowdown in INDPRO and HOUST signals easing real activity and weaker commodity-sensitive pricing pressure, which lowers long yields over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint decline in INDPRO and HOUST does not outperform either series alone in predicting lower 10-year yields, or if the combined signal is not negative in at least 60% of matched episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 remains above its prior-quarter path while PAYEMS also expands, the market infers durable nominal demand and tighter resource utilization, causing the 10-year yield to rise over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDP and payroll co-movements fail to predict higher yields over 60 trading days, or if the joint signal's hit rate falls below 55% in expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in CPIAUCSL followed by a lagged FEDFUNDS response raises expected policy tightening and term-premium repricing, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield upward over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds FEDFUNDS by at least 2 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-over-policy gaps do not precede higher 10-year yields, or if triggered episodes produce negative 20-day yield changes more often than positive ones.

mechanism_narrative: In a labor-market deterioration regime, falling PAYEMS alongside rising UNRATE signals recession risk and safe-haven duration demand, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined payroll-loss and unemployment-rise pattern does not coincide with lower yields in at least 60% of cases, or if the signal disappears outside recession-scare periods.

mechanism_narrative: After a sharp monthly drop in INDPRO, bond markets infer output slack and lower inflation pressure, so the 10-year Treasury yield falls over the next 5 trading days; the effect weakens if CPIAUCSL is simultaneously accelerating.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls by at least 0.5% month over month
failure_condition: Reject if industrial-production drops do not precede lower yields on short horizons, or if the signal flips positive when CPIAUCSL is not cooling.
